name: Witness Number 3
overview: One day at work, Jodie momentarily glances out of the window and in a split second her life descends into freefall. What she notices seems innocuous – two men walking on the opposite side of the road – but she’s actually witnessed a killer and his victim moments before a murder.

trailers.title: Witness Number 3 | Behind The Scenes with Sue Johnston & Nina Toussaint-White  | Channel 5
